title: Shungiku and Eastern Delight
description: A unique fusion of Japanese and Middle Eastern flavors, this dish combines the delicate taste of shungiku with the savory taste of eastern spices.

ingredients.name: Middle Eastern Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Mix of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the shungiku and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the Middle Eastern Spice Blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Season with Ali's Fancy Salt and Middle Cracked Pepper to taste.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the Eastern Fresh Lemon Juice.
6. Serve hot, garnished with additional shungiku if desired.
